layout_spacing.grid_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_spacing.surface_strategy: Flat solid surfaces with 1px border-zinc-200, no drop shadows. Strictly 2D and technical to reflect an authoritative enterprise tool.

components.buttons: Rounded-sm, flat colors. Primary uses bg-blue-600 text-white, secondary uses bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900. No soft shadows. High contrast.
components.cards: border border-zinc-200 rounded-sm bg-white p-6. No shadow. Minimalist. Let the typography do the work.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs. rounded-sm, border-zinc-300, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:border-transparent.
components.webcam_overlay: Fixed bottom-right or top-right. 1px border-zinc-200. Optional: Green/Red glowing 1px inner border to indicate eye-tracking/focus status.
components.trust_score: High contrast gauge. Mostly monochrome with a color-coded indicator (Green > 80, Yellow 50-80, Red < 50).

motion.page_transitions: None or instant. Emphasize speed and reliability over aesthetic motion.

image_urls.description: Modern corporate office space for the public landing page hero.
Placeholder for student profile or monitoring feed.
Focused student taking exam, for feature sections on landing page.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight. No duotone. Monochrome unless indicating an alert state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts via Google Fonts: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and IBM Plex Mono.
Apply strict Swiss minimalist principles: use raw grid lines and ample white space instead of shaded cards. The UI must feel like an objective, precise enterprise tool.
For the admin dashboard, create a high-density 'Control Room' grid layout.
For the student quiz interface, use a full-screen, distraction-free view with fixed timer/webcam components. Hide standard navigation.
The trust score and proctoring alerts MUST use high contrast 'danger' colors (Signal Red) to break the monochrome theme only when necessary.
Use purely structural HTML/Tailwind for layouts, but integrate Shadcn UI heavily customized with minimal border radius (rounded-sm or rounded-none) to match the brutalist Swiss style.
Ensure all interactive and key informational elements include data-testid attributes for robust automated testing (e.g., data-testid='start-quiz-button').
